name: pdf-to-anki-cards
description: A Claude Code/Codex skill and Python toolkit for turning PDFs into validated Anki .apkg decks.

scripts.test: PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=.pycache-test python3 -m py_compile scripts/*.py && python3 scripts/build_apkg.py --cards examples/cards.sample.json --out example.apkg --deck-name "Example Deck" && python3 scripts/validate_apkg.py example.apkg && rm -rf .pycache-test example.apkg
